Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}Daaamn... These fights got me on the edge of my seat![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Don't see much I could use in an actual battle, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}Also, why the heck would you guard and run from the opponent here? Makes zero sense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2146 0 0}Yo, perfect timing, Sanada-san! Mind if I pick your brain a bit?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}I see... So you're wondering why this guy didn't just follow up with another attack instead?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}I mean, look! His opponent's pretty much cornered, right? Don't get why you'd just back off after that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3094 0 0}Well, I don't think it's a bad tactic at all. Seems obvious enough to me that he's getting baited.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}He's letting himself get hit on purpose—[cr][n]probably because he's setting up a trap.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}What would you do here, Aigis? Would you still charge ahead, fists flying, when you know it's a trap?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3108 0 0}Heh. Guess we're on the same page, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}Seriously, you guys? C'mon, the answer's obvious: Go in guns blazing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Right? I'm with Ai-chan on this, man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}After all, the best defense is a good offense. You just gotta turn the tables and all that jazz![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 52 -1 0 0}Junpei, you're gonna get yourself killed one of these days with that thinking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 52 -1 0 0}What if you meet your match one day? You've gotta be realistic.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}Goin' in for a one-hit KO is one heck of a power move![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}Don't you agree, Ai-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2100 0 0}Really!? Personally, I think an ultimate attack is the one thing every good hero needs in their arsenal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}Well... If that's how you really feel, then you better work hard and see it through.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}Not like there's only one way to get stronger. You're just walking a different path from some of us, is all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei-san appears to have[n]overcome an internal struggle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3020 0 0}Anyway... Show me where your path to strength takes you, Junpei, in our next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2061 0 0}Uhhh... I just wanted to talk about killer moves and ultimate attacks, though?[n]{f 1 1}
